title: Can i put a note or a comment in a item?
excerpt:
I want to put a note in a item, for exemple: 
I have a customer and i have a number collumn, a date collumn and a status collum. I wanna write that this date is a sunday or is a birthday of someone by a note only in the …

posts.author: IvanGentil (Ivan Gentil de Rosa Oliveira)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to put a note in a item, for exemple:
I have a customer and i have a number collumn, a date collumn and a status collum. I wanna write that this date is a sunday or is a birthday of someone by a note only in the date not in the whole element. Can i do it?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @IvanGentil!

It is possible to add a little note to a specific status label (via the little + symbol when hovering over the status label in top right hand corner), if this interests you? However this is not possible via the date column I am afraid.

Alternatively, you can use a text column or the updates section - however I do understand you want the note specific to the date and not the entire item

posts.author: 132 (Gabriel)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, Bianca. I wish to know if there’s a way of making this note attach to the label itself, so every time this label its used, even on different boards, this note will come along. Is this possible?
